task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'admin@onboarding.com'
allow signup and login

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

when user calls POST /api/customers sending customer_data:
  requires login
  validate customer_data:
    name must not be empty
    company must not be empty
  saved = save customer_data to Customers
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers:
  customers = get all Customers
  send back customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  onboarding_customers = get all Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  send back onboarding_customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  customer = look up Customer with this id
  send back customer

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:id sending update_data:
  requires login
  save update_data to Customers
  send back update_data

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Customers with this id
  send back 'deleted'

when user calls POST /api/customers/:customer_id/steps sending step_data:
  requires login
  validate step_data:
    step_name must not be empty
  step_data's customer_id is this customer_id
  saved = save step_data to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers/:customer_id/steps:
  steps = get all OnboardingSteps where customer_id is this customer_id
  send back steps

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:step_id sending step_update:
  requires login
  save step_update to OnboardingSteps
  send back step_update

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:step_id:
  requires login
  remove from OnboardingSteps with this step_id
  send back 'deleted'

page 'Onboarding Tracker' at '/':
  on page load get customers from '/api/customers'
  
  customer_name = ''
  customer_company = ''
  
  section 'Add New Customer' with style app_card:
    'Name' as text input saved as customer_name
    'Company' as text input saved as customer_company
    button 'Add Customer':
      send {name: customer_name, company: customer_company} as a new record to '/api/customers'
      set customer_name to ''
      set customer_company to ''
  
  section 'Customers' with style app_card:
    display customers
